content:
I am an Economic graduate student at the Sharif University of Technology in Tehran, Iran. Also, I am a Research Assistant at the Data Analysis Center of the Graduate School of Management and Economics (GSME). I received my Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering (Minor in Economics) from the Sharif University of Technology. My main research interests are Environmental Economics, Natural Resource Economics, Energy Economics, and Climate Change.
Download my resumé .
summary: I am an Economic graduate student at the Sharif University of Technology in Tehran, Iran. Also, I am a Research Assistant at the Data Analysis Center of the Graduate School of Management and Economics (GSME).
title: Pouya Arab
